summary: Sprint 30 — TiltGuideOverlay / RemoteUX 3-meter system testing. CRITICAL BUG FOUND & FIXED: AuthContext.tsx had orphaned duplicate code (lines 61-62) from previous agent's partial edit, causing a fatal SyntaxError that crashed the entire app. After fix, all 5 tabs load crash-free, and the full tilt_setup → TiltGuideOverlay flow verified end-to-end.

react_native_issues.issue: On web browser, DeviceMotion sensor (expo-sensors) is unavailable. Console logs: 'expo-sensors: setUpdateInterval() is not supported on web'. The component correctly falls back by skipping tilt_check phase and going directly to countdown. Expected behavior per context note.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AuthContext.tsx lines 61-62 had orphaned duplicate code from previous sprint's partial type edit — leftover `height_cm?: number; weight_kg?: number; age?: number; training_level?: string;` and `}) => Promise<User>;` fragment after the register() type definition. This caused a fatal SyntaxError in Metro bundler, crashing the entire app on load.
MINOR: Multiple deprecation warnings throughout the app (props.pointerEvents, shadow*, textShadow*) — pre-existing, not introduced by this sprint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 30 TiltGuideOverlay integration is working correctly. AuthContext.tsx syntax error was fixed (orphaned duplicate type lines removed). All 5 tabs (ARENA/KORE/NEXUS/DNA/HALL) load crash-free. TiltGuideOverlay flow verified: NEXUS → THE FORGE → PERSONAL TRAINING → DEEP SQUAT → TiltGuideOverlay (POSIZIONAMENTO SCAN header, SALTA button, countdown, flash_beacon with RESTA FERMO + INIZIA ORA). SALTA skip button works. INIZIA ORA button works. On web, DeviceMotion is not available so bubble level (tilt_check phase) is skipped — component falls back gracefully to countdown immediately (expected behavior). voice_scripts.json verified with all required keys in IT/EN/ES. RemoteUXEngine.ts verified with WebVoiceEngine + PingEngine. All features working.
rca_of_issue: AuthContext.tsx SyntaxError RCA: Previous testing agent (Sprint 29) flagged that AuthContext register() TypeScript type was missing 'gender?: string'. Main agent (E1) attempted to fix by adding gender to the type, but introduced a double-entry bug — the new type definition was added at lines 57-60 correctly, but the old type's closing fragment (lines 61-62: orphaned `height_cm?... training_level?: string;` and `}) => Promise<User>;`) was not removed. This created an invalid TypeScript syntax (two consecutive type property definitions with no separating comma/structure). Metro bundler failed to parse AuthContext.tsx and showed a fatal red-screen error blocking the entire app.
verified_features: voice_scripts.json: All required keys (tilt_welcome, tilt_ok, tilt_too_flat, tilt_too_steep, move_back, center_ok, scan_starting, scan_complete) exist in IT/EN/ES ✓
RemoteUXEngine.ts: WebVoiceEngine (Web Speech API) and PingEngine (AudioContext parking sensor) implemented ✓
TiltGuideOverlay.tsx: BubbleLevel component, DeviceMotion integration, ScreenFlash beacon, phases tilt_check→countdown→flash_beacon all implemented ✓
nexus-trigger.tsx: handleForgeSelect calls setPhase('tilt_setup'), tilt_setup phase renders TiltGuideOverlay ✓
UI: POSIZIONAMENTO SCAN header visible, SALTA skip button visible and functional, flash_beacon shows RESTA FERMO + INIZIA ORA ✓
All 5 tabs (ARENA, KORE, NEXUS, DNA, HALL) load without crash after integration ✓
